text:
Connection Severing Scissors (縁切り鋏) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

!Card Effect:
|align=center colspan="3"|Cut a picture of someone you don't want to see with these scissors, and you will never see them again. Caution: It will take effect on everyone in the picture (except yourself).

Summary

Connection Severing Scissors 縁切り鋏 - These scissors allow the user to cut a picture of someone you know, and you will never see them again. This is a useful tool if you meet someone you feel is a massive threat. Simply take a photo of them, cut any part of the photo and the ability will take effect. This should be used with caution because it cannot be undone. Also worth noting is that it will work on everybody in the photo. If you only want to sever your connection with one person, you can't use a group photo.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.014 - 縁切り鋏 
このハサミで会いたくない人の写真を切ると、その人と２度と会わずにすむようになる。その写真に映っている人全てに有効（本人を除く）なので、注意が必要。
|-
![Eng]
|No.014 - Connection Severing Scissors 
If you cut out people you don't want to meet twice off pictures, It becomes unnescessary to meet them again. It effects everyone in the picture (except the user), so care must be taken.
|}
